# Version-Affecting Changes

<!-- Generated by go run ./tools/distributionhostdocs -write-doc. Do not edit by hand. -->

[Back to Store Channel Policy](../store-channel-policy.md)

| Change | Version impact | Required evidence |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Add a new `DistributionChannel` | `change:additive` | Regenerate StoreChannelPolicy table and distribution host docs. |
| Relax provider CLI bundling prohibition | `change:breaking-policy` | Legal and Store review decision evidence is required before policy code changes. |
| Add a Local IPC endpoint kind | C11 additive change | Generated local IPC docs and hostintegration endpoint model evidence must change together. |
| Let C1-C10 import OS-specific IPC adapters | context boundary violation | Not a valid versioned change; keep OS adapters behind C11. |
